regional_cost_note: Builders in Napier typically charge $80–$100/hr for labour. New builds run $2,800–$4,200/m² depending on specifications. Heritage renovations on the city's Art Deco villas often command a premium due to specialist joinery and plasterwork. Always verify your builder's LBP licence at lbp.govt.nz before signing a contract.

businesses.name: Total Renovations Limited
businesses.known_for: Full home renovation specialists in Hawke's Bay since 2017; over 100 projects completed with a 280-point quality control checklist and weekly client updates.

businesses.name: Toa Civil Construction Limited
businesses.known_for: General and civil construction covering residential builds, earthworks, concrete, foundations, and demolition across Napier and Hawke's Bay; established by engineers in 2021.

businesses.name: BB Build
businesses.known_for: Passive House accredited sole trader delivering superior-finish new builds and renovations in Hawke's Bay with a portfolio of high-spec residential projects.

businesses.name: Dougan Homes
businesses.known_for: Locally owned since 2018; Master Builders member specialising in custom new homes, renovations, and eco-friendly builds with a personalised approach and fixed-price contracts.

businesses.name: Lamont Homes Ltd
businesses.known_for: Ground-up residential construction with 17 years of experience; handles work from concrete to roofline including sheds, decking, pergolas, and general builds at competitive rates.
